name: Rozie Sigils (TypeScript partial)
comment: Injection grammar that paints the Rozie $sigils inside .rzts script partials. injectionSelector `L:source.rozie.ts` confines it to the source.rozie.ts top scope (so it can NEVER leak into ordinary .ts files), and because it is an injection it wins at EVERY nesting depth — unlike a flat `include`, which only reaches the root context. Registered in VS Code via `injectTo: ["source.rozie.ts"]` and in the Monaco playground via the Registry `getInjections` option.

magic-identifier.comment: COPY of the canonical `magic-identifier` repository entry in source.rozie (tools/textmate/syntaxes/rozie.tmLanguage.json ~line 595). KEEP IN SYNC when new $-identifiers ship.
magic-identifier.name: variable.language.rozie support.variable.rozie
